Video.summary: Music legends including the Beatles, the Bee Gees, the Byrds, the Four Tops, the Temptations and the Rolling Stones.

Video.title: Great Groups

Video.summary: Soul music: The Supremes; the Jackson Five; James Brown; the Righteous Brothers; The Temptations; the Four Tops.

Video.summary: British invasion: the Beatles; the Animals; Herman's Hermits; the Rolling Stones; the Searchers; Gerry and the Pacemakers.

Video.summary: 1967: Johnny Rivers; the Supremes; the Association; the Mammas and the Papas; the Rolling Stones.

Video.summary: Ed Sullivan presents Jerry Lewis teaching Ed how to be a better host, Pat Cooper's Italian humor, impressionist Will Jordan, Irwin C. Watson's inoffensive jokes.

Video.summary: Ed Sullivan presents Moms Mabley "Her Hearing," Sid Caesar "Meeting Girl's Parents," Jack Paar "His New House," Pat Cooper and Scoey Mitchell "A Black Man Moves Into an Italian Neighborhood."

Video.summary: Clips and reminiscences show Sullivan and his 23-year variety series; host Burt Reynolds; the Beatles; Elvis Presley; the Rolling Stones; Tom Jones; Tina Turner; the Fifth Dimension; Harry Belafonte; the Byrds; Nat King Cole; Roy Orbison; Bob Hope.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
Video.title: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II

Image.alt: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II

Video.summary: Host Mary Tyler Moore shows clips of Sullivan's 23-year variety series. With Milton Berle; John Byner; Jack Carter; Shecky Greene; Alan King; Shari Lewis; Rich Little; Dick Martin; Joan Rivers; Flip Wilson; Victor Borge.
Video.grandparentTitle: All Star Comedy From the Ed Sullivan Show
Video.title: All Star Comedy From the Ed Sullivan Show

Image.alt: All Star Comedy From the Ed Sullivan Show
All Star Comedy From the Ed Sullivan Show
